task_completion.description: Create the 'IsCitizenOf' edge class in the database
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for OrientDB Studio schema view, OrientDB console output, or a script execution showing the creation of an edge class named 'IsCitizenOf'.

task_completion.description: Create edges linking Profiles to Countries based on semantic nationality mapping
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for database query results, graph visualization, or script output confirming that 'IsCitizenOf' edges were created connecting Profile vertices to existing Country vertices.

task_completion.description: Create the nationality audit report file at the correct path
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor (e.g., nano, vim, gedit) or terminal output (e.g., cat, ls) showing the file '/home/ga/nationality_audit.txt'.

task_completion.description: List successful Email to Country mappings in the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the contents of the audit report. It must list successful mappings showing Profile Emails linked to Country Names (e.g., mapping to United States, United Kingdom, Netherlands).

task_completion.description: Include a separate section for Unmapped Nationalities in the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the contents of the audit report. It must contain a distinct section for 'Unmapped Nationalities' that identifies 'Mexican' or 'carlos.lopez@example.com'.

integrity.description: Agent actually queried the OrientDB database to find profiles and countries
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent executing SELECT queries in OrientDB Studio, console, or via a script to inspect the 'Profiles' and 'Countries' classes before writing the report.

integrity.description: Agent did not create new country vertices for unmapped nationalities
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that there are no INSERT or CREATE VERTEX commands adding 'Mexico' to the Countries class, as the instructions explicitly state to identify unmapped profiles 'without creating new country vertices'.

integrity.description: Report is saved to the exact requested path
integrity.visual_evidence: The file path '/home/ga/nationality_audit.txt' should be visible in the text editor's title bar, status bar, or in the terminal command used to save/view the file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required edge class is 'IsCitizenOf'. The report must be saved exactly to '/home/ga/nationality_audit.txt'. Successful mappings to verify include: American -> United States, British -> United Kingdom, and Dutch -> Netherlands. The expected unmapped nationality (orphan) is 'Mexican', which corresponds to the email 'carlos.lopez@example.com'.
